chapters.title: The Digital Battlefield
chapters.description: Discover the world of Blue Teams and the Security Operations Center. Learn why we defend and what we defend against.

chapters.title: The Art of OSINT
chapters.description: Learn how attackers gather info and how defenders use Open Source Intelligence to predict and prevent threats.

chapters.title: Networking for Defenders
chapters.description: Master the OSI Model, TCP/IP handshakes, and common ports. You cannot detect what you cannot see.

chapters.title: Endpoint Security Foundations
chapters.description: Dive deep into Windows and Linux security events. Understand processes, event logs, and system monitoring.

chapters.title: The SIEM Command Center
chapters.description: Enter the brain of the SOC. Learn how to query data lakes, correlate events, and build dashboards with Splunk/ELK logic.

chapters.title: Log Analysis Mastery
chapters.description: Hundreds of alerts... which one is real? Develop the analyst mindset to triage logs from Firewalls, Proxies, and DNS.

chapters.title: Network Traffic Analysis
chapters.description: Wireshark is your window into the wire. Identify C2 beacons, data exfiltration, and port scans.

chapters.title: Phishing & Email Forensics
chapters.description: The #1 attack vector. Analyze headers, SPF/DKIM, and malicious attachments to save your org from the hook.

chapters.title: Intro to Malware Analysis
chapters.description: No, don't double-click it. Learn static and basic dynamic analysis to understand what the malware wants.

chapters.title: Incident Response Workflow
chapters.description: The alarm is real. Follow the PICERL model (Preparation, Identification, Containment, Eradication, Recovery, Lessons Learned).

chapters.title: Threat Intelligence & MITRE ATT&CK
chapters.description: Stop playing whack-a-mole. Learn to map alerts to TTPs (Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures).

chapters.title: Building Your Home SOC Lab
chapters.description: Capstone preparation. Deploy VMs, install a SIEM, and generate your own attacks to defend against.
